command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27R9X8y6NNhYUV4.71850b5399e5 --database bFcyWdAL5JXed3bpyDvBEf --execute 
SELECT h.clientId, h.name, h.categoryClientId, h.isActive
FROM habits h
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM categories c
  WHERE c.userId = h.userId AND c.clientId = h.categoryClientId
);

rows.name: Reach out to a friend or family

stdout:

h1	Exercise / Workout	health	1

h3	Sleep 7+ hours	health	1
